title: Homilies on the Statues: The Dignity of Man
description: Chrysostom preaches to a terrified Antioch after rioters destroy the emperor's statues: true dignity comes not from statues but from the image of God in each person.
introduction: Chrysostom preaches to a terrified Antioch after rioters destroy the emperor's statues: true dignity comes not from statues but from the image of God in each person.

translation.text: What is man that you are mindful of him? He is made in the image of God. Even if the statues are broken, that image cannot be destroyed.
